name: Monthly backup verification
description: Restore a random backup and verify data integrity

name: Annual penetration test
description: External penetration test of internet-facing assets

name: Weekly vulnerability scan
description: Automated vulnerability scan on all production hosts

name: Security awareness training
description: Deliver information security awareness training to all personnel, covering current threats, policies, and expected behaviours (Annex A 6.3).

name: Access rights review
description: Review user access rights across all critical systems to ensure least-privilege and timely revocation of unnecessary access (Annex A 5.18).

name: Business continuity testing
description: Test business continuity and disaster recovery plans to verify they meet recovery objectives and address current risks (Annex A 5.30).

name: Risk assessment review
description: Review and update the information security risk assessment to account for changes in threats, vulnerabilities, assets, and business context (clause 8.2).

name: Management review
description: Hold a management review meeting to evaluate ISMS performance, risk treatment effectiveness, and opportunities for improvement (clause 9.3).

name: Internal ISMS audit
description: Conduct a full internal audit of the ISMS to verify conformity with ISO 27001 requirements and the organisation's own policies (clause 9.2).

name: Quarterly access review
description: Review and certify user access rights across all systems
applied_controls: Context of organization document, Audit plan document
